name: Mushroom Miso Cornucopia
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Whole button mushrooms (or medium mushrooms)
2 tablespoons Regular sesame oil (or oil of your choice)
2 cups Fresh Brussels sprouts (stems cut off and halved)
recipeInstructions:
Yield: Four 1 cup portions
Prep time: 20 to 25 minutes
1. Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add onions, mushrooms, salt, pepper, and tarragon leaves.
3. Sauté vegetables for about 5 minutes until they start to soften.
4. Add flaked seitan and Brussels sprouts to the pan.
5. Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until all ingredients are heated through.
6. Stir in miso sauce and cook for another minute, ensuring it is well combined.
7. Serve as is, or over grain, pasta, or toast for breakfast.
NOTE: The word "flaked" refers to a style of cut in which the food medium is thinly sliced at a 45 degree angle.
